nodes.name: Webhook — New Build Completed
nodes.notes: Call this webhook whenever Matthew finishes a build. Payload: { store, section, before_img, after_img, client_type, headline }

nodes.name: Daily 10AM — Check Queue
nodes.notes: Also posts queued content every morning at 10am

parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1000, system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude — Write Captions
nodes.notes: Calls Claude API to write platform-specific captions. Add Anthropic API key in credentials.

nodes.name: Write Queue File
nodes.notes: Writes the social post JSON to disk — Execute Command handles fs outside the sandbox.

parameters.subject: 📱 HOO Social Post Ready — Review & Approve

nodes.name: Email Preview to Matthew
nodes.notes: Matthew reviews before anything posts. Manual approval required for first month.

_meta.description: Triggered when Matthew finishes a build. Claude writes 3 platform-specific captions (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok). Saves to queue. Emails Matthew a preview for approval before anything posts. Replaces Blotato $29/mo.
_meta.trigger: POST to /hoo-social-trigger with: { store, section, before_img, after_img, client_type, headline }
_meta.manual_posting: For now, Matthew reviews and posts manually. Phase 2: connect Facebook Graph API for auto-posting.
